heading: Issue of patent to assignee
label: 152 Issue of patent to assignee
text: Patents may be granted to the assignee of the inventor of record in the Patent and Trademark Office, upon the application made and the specification sworn to by the inventor, except as otherwise provided in this title.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 44 (R.S. 4895).Language is changed and the reference to reissue is omitted in view of the general provision in section 251.
Amendments1975— substituted “Patent and Trademark Office” for “Patent Office”.Pub. L. 93–596
Effective Date of 1975 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under , Commerce and Trade.Pub. L. 93–596section 4 of Pub. L. 93–596section 1111 of Title 15Jan. 2, 1975
